name: "Last Floor"
description:
"Hi..."
-----------------------------------------------------------

Scenario: You wake up in a strange place that looks like an endless Khrushchev, after which, while making your way through the corridors, you find a note warning you about an entity that you should ignore, then you meet the entity itself...

-----------------------------------------------------------
My new bot, this one has fewer tokens or is it normal because it will have to miss a couple of points that were in previous bots, for example, what kind of background story can I write about an anomalous entity existing in an endless Khrushchev?

The bot is part of my favorite theme Horror, I'm going to make 3 or even more Horror bots with some monsters in the future.

And I was also inspired by the theme and vibe for the bot after playing in a VERY unpopular place in Roblox (There are only 6 people online there now), but I personally think that such a small online is not deserved and it deserves more.

Who is interested in the name of the place in Roblox "Last Floor" (Yes, the name of the bot is after this place, it seemed to me that it fits).

I still don't know what makes my bots popular, because some bots collect 3 thousand messages and others don't collect even 300... (I really don't understand the reason, just few people find them? Are they just not interesting to people? Or is the bot's implementation bad? Or am I just fooling myself and that's normal?)

If this bot also collects little, then I'll just release a meme version of the OC/Face of the channel, of a Russian YouTuber, because I'm already running out of ideas.
creator: KetMah
